{{Infobox artifact
| name = Awakened weapons
| introduced = ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers
}}

== Of Kings and Killers ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|Some [[bandits]] carried [[Awakened weapons]].<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c18">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 18</ref>}}

== Of Killers and Kings ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|The items in the coffins are [[Awakened weapons]] made from [[Kameira]].<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c9">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 9</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Awakened weapons]] are being used in battle.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c26">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 26</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Awakened weapons]] strike with light of every color.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c26" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Artifacts]]
[[Category:Of Kings and Killers]]
[[Category:Of Killers and Kings]]
[[Category:Elder Empire]]
[[Category:Elder Empire artifacts]]
